description: Perform a flood risk assessment for Liechtenstein using OpenStreetMap data. Using the waterways (gis_osm_waterways_free_1.shp) and populated places (gis_osm_places_free_1.shp) layers located in /home/ga/GIS_Data/liechtenstein/, identify all populated places within a 1 kilometer dissolved buffer of the 'Rhein' (or 'Rhine') river. Export the identified features to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/at_risk_towns.geojson using EPSG:4326.
